text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having suffered a light sprain, Copano Rickey is
forced to withdraw from the Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Instead, she appears on a race commentary
channel as a feng shui commentator, and her feng
shui-inspired predictions are spot-on.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This catapults her toward her goal of bringing
everyone happiness through feng shui, as her
commentary triggers a new feng shui boom.
